heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 20904 Authorization of appropriations
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15304 of Title 42

children.text: 50 percent shall be for payments under ; andsection 20901 of this title
50 percent shall be for payments under .section 20902 of this title

children.heading: Continuing availability of funds after appropriation
children.label: b Continuing availability of funds after appropriation
children.text: Any payment made to a State under this subchapter shall be available to the State without fiscal year limitation (subject to subsection (c)(2)(B)).

children.heading: Use of returned funds and funds remaining unexpended for requirements payments
children.label: c Use of returned funds and funds remaining unexpended for requirements payments

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The amounts described in paragraph (2) shall be transferred to the Election Assistance Commission (established under subchapter II) and used by the Commission to make requirements payments under subpart 1 of part D of subchapter II.

children.label: A
children.text: Any amounts paid to the Administrator by a State under .section 20902(d)(1) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: Any amounts appropriated for payments under this subchapter which remain unobligated as of .September 1, 2003

children.heading: Deposit of amounts in State election fund
children.label: d Deposit of amounts in State election fund
children.text: When a State has established an election fund described in , the State shall ensure that any funds provided to the State under this subchapter are deposited and maintained in such fund.section 21004(b) of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations for Administrator
children.label: e Authorization of appropriations for Administrator
children.text: In addition to the amounts authorized under subsection (a), there are authorized to be appropriated to the Administrator such sums as may be necessary to administer the programs under this subchapter.
